short_description: Change request — add a streetlight at the dark Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue corner
description: Requesting the installation of a new streetlight at the corner of Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue, which is unlit and hazardous at night. Field survey and utility coordination required before scheduling. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — repave the deteriorated 300 block of Munroe Court
description: Requesting the deteriorated pavement on the 300 block of Munroe Court be added to the resurfacing schedule after repeated pothole repairs. Pavement assessment and budgeting required. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — adjust yard-waste collection day for the Munroe Court route
description: Requesting a review of the yard-waste collection day for the Munroe Court route after repeated missed pickups. Route schedule change to be evaluated by operations. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — add a curb cut and drainage inlet at the Munroe Court low point
description: Requesting a new drainage inlet and improved curb cut at the low point of Munroe Court where stormwater repeatedly ponds. Engineering review and design required before construction. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — emergency clearing of a downed limb blocking Munroe Court
description: Requesting emergency dispatch to clear a large limb that came down across the travel lane on Munroe Court after high winds. Immediate crew action required. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — replace the faded stop sign at the Munroe Court intersection
description: Requesting replacement of the badly faded stop sign at the Munroe Court intersection with a new high-reflectivity sign. Sign fabrication and installation to be scheduled. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — repair the heaved sidewalk panel on the 300 block of Munroe Court
description: Requesting repair or replacement of the cracked, heaved sidewalk panel on the 300 block of Munroe Court that has become a tripping hazard. Concrete work to be scheduled with the highways crew. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — swap the cracked recycling cart at 327 Munroe Court
description: Requesting removal of the cracked recycling cart with the broken lid at 327 Munroe Court and delivery of a replacement cart. Cart exchange to be scheduled on the next route pass. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — clear and regrade the roadside ditch along Munroe Court
description: Requesting the roadside ditch along Munroe Court be cleared and regraded to stop standing water and shoulder erosion after storms. Drainage crew work order and grading review needed. Requested by Juan Hernandez.

short_description: Change request — restore the skipped trash pickup for the Munroe Court route
description: Requesting a review of the Munroe Court collection route after repeated skipped trash pickups, and a make-up collection for the affected addresses. Route audit and return trip to be scheduled. Requested by Juan Hernandez.
